channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Festival d’Astronomie de Fleurance 2026 : cap sur les familles, l’éclipse solaire du 12 août en point d’orgue
item.description: Pour sa 36e édition, le Festival d’Astronomie de Fleurance réunit au cœur du Gers scientifiques, passionnés et grand public du 31 juillet au 7 août 2026. Résolument tourné vers les familles, il inaugure des formats inédits et prépare les festivaliers à vivre un moment céleste exceptionnel :...

item.title: ISS astronauts had to shelter in place in the SpaceX Dragon capsule because of an air leak
item.description: We're waiting to learn more about what happened aboard the International Space Station.

item.title: This $1.33 per month VPN is the most customizable option out there — perfect if you're after a secure connection tailored to your exact needs
item.description: Boost your digital privacy your own way

item.title: Les données de santé de ces bagues connectées ont été piratées
item.description: La start-up Ultrahuman a été victime d’un piratage en mars dernier. Les mots de passe des utilisateurs n’ont pas été compromis, mais d’autres informations confidentielles, notamment liées à la santé, ont été exposées.

item.title: Roaming en Europe : les forfaits mobiles seront bientôt utilisables sont surcoût dans 6 nouveaux pays
item.description: La Commission Européenne vient d'autoriser l'ouverture des négociations afin de permettre à six pays des Balkans de rejoindre le régime "Roam Like at Home". Déjà rejoint par une trentaine de pays, le programme permet aux voyageurs d'utiliser leur forfait mobile sans surcout à l'étranger.

item.title: Orange fait une promo sur son forfait 5G+ spécial voyage avec 250 Go de data dont 40 Go hors Europe
item.description: Le Forfait Voyage 250 Go 5G+ chez Orange propose une bande passante dédiée et une eSIM Watch offerte en plus du reste, pour 24,99 euros par mois la première année.

item.title: New York lawmakers pass one-year ban on new data centers
item.description: The New York State legislature passed a one-year moratorium on new large data centers, the first statewide ban of its kind if Democratic Governor Kathy Hochul signs it into law. Lawmakers behind the bill say it's meant to give policymakers time to understand the impact of large data centers on the environment and energy prices. […]

item.title: The Future Game Show Summer Showcase airs tomorrow and will offer an extended look at Exodus, plus new trailers and big game announcements — here's when you can tune in
item.description: It's almost time for the annual Future Game Show Summer Showcase. Here's how you can watch and what to expect.

item.title: 'Not your usual business PC': Dell Pro Max Tower T2 workstation with a Core Ultra 9 CPU, RTX 2000 Ada graphics, 32GB RAM, and 1TB SSD delivers insanely powerful performance and professional reliability — and it's $900 off right now
item.description: Save $900 on the Dell Pro Max Tower T2, a workstation built for demanding professional workloads and serious performance.

item.title: Panasonic Lumix L10 vs Fujifilm X100VI: two of my favorite premium compact cameras, but which one is best for everyday photography?
item.description: Panasonic unveiled its prettiest camera in years, the retro Lumix L10 premium compact, and many are naturally billing it as a versatile alternative to the popular Fujifilm X100VI. Here's how the two cameras compare

item.title: 'Nintendo products are fully compliant with these requirements' — A new Nintendo Switch 2 model featuring a removable battery will be released in the EU soon to meet regulations
item.description: Nintendo has announced that it will soon release a revised Switch 2 model with a removable battery in Europe to meet new regulations.

item.title: Anthropic's bizarre call for everyone to slow down on AI is a pipe dream — here's why that will never happen
item.description: Anthropic's fears about recursive development are well-founded, but its idea for how to control it is laughable.

item.title: The DOGE Boys Get VC Funding to Support Their Latest Enterprise
item.description: Former DOGE members and Elon Musk allies are backing a startup aimed at using AI to apply "learnings" from DOGE to the private sector.

item.title: Proxmox VE virtualization platform review
item.description: Powerful open-source virtualization for users ready to move beyond desktop VM tools

item.title: Google Fitbit Air review: The affordable Whoop alternative hits all the right notes, but its messy AI-powered app holds it back from greatness
item.description: Not quite a Whoop killer, but good enough for most people.

item.title: Le pied sur l’accélérateur, Anthropic appelle le monde à ralentir le développement de l’IA
item.description: Le laboratoire qui s'est bâti une réputation de prudence voudrait que toute l'industrie lève le pied. Le hic : il vient lui-même d'écraser l'accélérateur comme jamais.

item.title: Has Microsoft Lost Its Mojo (Again)?
item.description: Microsoft’s AI products aren’t selling and Github’s been plagued with troubles. WIRED spoke with VP Scott Hanselman about whether the company is in catch-up mode.

item.title: Rivals season 2 episode 6 has the worst cliffhanger ending of any TV show this decade — and it proves why streamers like Hulu and Disney+ are doing so badly by its LGBTQIA+ characters
item.description: Rivals season 2 episode 6 has ended its mid-season break with a shock death that absolutely nobody saw coming — but not only was it completely unnecessary, it's lazy storytelling.

item.title: The token bill comes due: Inside the industry scramble to manage AI’s runaway costs
item.description: "The whole conversation shifted from tokenmaxxing and 'go fast' to 'we need guardrails, how do we control this?'"

item.title: iPhone Ultra vs Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 rumors: which 2026 foldable is shaping up to be the better phone?
item.description: The iPhone Ultra and Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 could have a lot in common, so which one is sounding best so far?

item.title: Amazon finally price-matches this 'extremely powerful' Windows 11 mini PC ahead of Prime Day — and it's my favorite machine for professionals and creators
item.description: Packing 16GB of DDR5 RAM and a 1TB SSD , this Geekom mini PC delivered the kind of performance you'd expect from a much larger desktop PC, and excelled in our tests.

item.title: Russian hackers attack Europe for the Motherland in crypto fueled Great Patriotic Cyber War
item.description: NoName057(16) launched "Patriotic Online Games", calling all hackers to participate and get paid in crypto.

item.title: NASA briefly sheltered space station astronauts in SpaceX’s Dragon due to leaks
item.description: The space agency said Roscosmos discovered new leaks in the Russian service module.

item.title: The University of Cambridge says it successfully tested a vaccine with an AI-designed antigen
item.description: It's the first instance of an vaccine antigen designed exclusively by artificial intelligence.

item.title: KVM virtual machine software review
item.description: Powerful Linux-native virtualization for users comfortable with the tools around it.

item.title: NSA said to be readying Anthropic’s Mythos for use in cyber operations
item.description: The U.S. eavesdropping agency is reportedly preparing Anthropic's Mythos for use in cyberattacks, despite a federal ban on using the AI model maker.

item.title: Why everyday Workplace Tech Frustration is hybrid work's biggest unsolved problem
item.description: Fix broken workplace tech to unlock effective hybrid meetings

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures berlines électriques à acheter en 2026 ?
item.description: Bien que peu populaire, la berline est une voiture polyvalente. Elle s'adapte aux familles, à la ville ou aux déplacements plus longs. Nous avons sélectionné les meilleures berlines électriques que nous avons testées.

item.title: Two DACs for wildly different budgets unveiled at High End, from iFi's pocketable pal to AMR's 'price on request' hunk of hi-res conversion
item.description: Could you get any further apart yet stay within the hi-res DAC realm? AMR and iFi prove there's something for every music lover at High End, despite the show's name.

item.title: À l’approche de la Coupe du Monde, RMC inclut ses chaînes sports et BeIN Sports dans une offre à moins de 20 euros
item.description: Pour ne pas rater une miette de la Coupe du Monde, mais aussi de la NBA, de la NFL ou encore du MMA, RMC propose BeIN Sports et RMC Sport à 19 euros par mois.

item.title: After spending all week gawking at the new MSI Claw 8 EX AI+, I think I’m finally ready to bid adieu to my beloved Steam Deck
item.description: I’m finally willing to admit the Steam Deck has expended its usefulness now I’ve tried the MSI 8 Claw EX AI+

item.title: Inside Madonna’s Horny, Full-Throttle Grindr Takeover
item.description: From talking about sex with JFK Jr. to a surprise show in Times Square, the queen of pop is leveraging Grindr’s “gayborhood” to sell her new album.

item.title: MAHA wants to make cotton the new beef tallow
item.description: In between beef tallow fries, raw milk, and vaccine denialism, Make America Healthy Again figureheads have set their sights on another slice of life: our clothing. "The MAHA movement doesn't stop with what we EAT - It's also about what we WEAR," Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins said in a post on X in late […]

item.title: Vegetarian restaurant chain Clover Food Labs is reopening: List of saved locations include those in Boston
item.description: News of its closure last month had led to an outpouring of customer support along with an investment. Here’s the latest. Last week, Fast Company reported that Clover Food Lab was closing after over 17 years in business due to financial challenges. The Boston-based vegetarian eatery was a local favorite known for its locally sourced, farm-fresh ingredients....

item.title: Agentic AI traffic from financial services industry doubles in a single month – finance could be the next industry to experience the AI boom
item.description: Though overall traffic is still very low, finance is seeing major growth in agentic AI use cases.

item.title: ‘One of the most easily adjustable pre-built boards available’ — I reviewed Wobkey’s 65% mechanical keyboard and its toolless case design makes swapping out its parts a breeze
item.description: With a toolless ball-catch aluminum case, 240g internal brass weight, and a range of included structural components, the Wobkey Zen 65 is one of the most moddable pre-built boards you’ll find at this price.

item.title: Coupe du Monde 2026 : où, quand et comment regarder le championnat du monde de football ?
item.description: À peine la Ligue des champions a-t-elle pris fin que la Coupe du monde de football s'apprête à débuter. Bientôt, les équipes de 48 nations s'affronteront à travers le Canada, le Mexique et les États-Unis. Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir pour suivre la compétition.

item.title: Madonna streamed a surprise concert on Grindr
item.description: Madonna performed a pop-up concert in Times Square that she announced on Grindr.

item.title: « Savez-vous quand les chevaux ont été interdits ? » Volkswagen a sa façon bien à lui d’expliquer pourquoi le thermique est condamné
item.description: Le patron des ventes de VW compare les voitures thermiques aux chevaux : personne ne les a interdits, ils ont juste été dépassés. Sa vision de la transition électrique, sans contrainte réglementaire.

item.title: U.S. labor report for May shows a surprising 172,000 jobs added to the economy
item.description: Unemployment stayed at 4.3% for the month of May. U.S. employers added a surprising 172,000 jobs in May as the labor market continued to show resilience in the face of rising costs from the Iran war.The Labor Department reported Friday that job growth was down slightly last month from a revised 179,000 in April. The unemployment rate stayed at a low 4.3%Hiring has bounced back this year from a miserable 2025, showing unexpected strength in the face of economic uncertainty and painfully high energy prices caused by the Iran war.Unemployment remained at a low 4.3% in May.The job gains were broad...

item.title: Canada’s Bill C-22: Why Signal, Apple, and top VPNs are fighting the 'surveillance' law
item.description: Big tech and VPN companies are demanding better protections for encryption as the government agrees to clarify contentious points.

item.title: Mesurer votre rythme cardiaque en regardant votre smartphone, la nouvelle idée de Google
item.description: Google aimerait que tous les smartphones servent à mesurer de manière passive le rythme cardiaque des utilisateurs, et les premiers tests sont encourageants.

item.title: What do you mean my new smart scale is ‘built for GLP-1 users’?
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. A few days ago, I walked into the basement of a midtown gym. Smoothies and healthy snacks were passed out. […]

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (June 5)
item.description: From Pixar's latest animated feature to Apple's Cape Fear reimagining, here's what's worth watching this weekend.

item.title: The World Cup will be broadcast in Dolby Vision HDR and higher-quality Dolby Atmos using the new AC-4 streaming format for the first time — but only Peacock subscribers will be celebrating this victory
item.description: Peacock will be the first major streamer to deploy Dolby's AC-4 audio codec in Telemundo's coverage of the 2026 World Cup

item.title: Game Pass en juin 2026 : Persona, Solarpunk, Starseeker… Voici les neuf premiers jeux du mois
item.description: Microsoft vient de dévoiler la première vague des sorties de juin sur le Game Pass. Regardons de plus près ce qu'il y a au programme.

item.title: This AI startup says it can tell if a script will make a hit film
item.description: When Quilty hit the industry trades earlier this year, the AI startup promised that its tool could accurately predict a film's success just by reading the script. When people actually got a chance to experiment with Quilty's product, though, they were left skeptical. Even with all the available data in the world, it predicted the […]
